'''鈭歵h-s-th-v''' ('''kathasthevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vooley|vooley]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vooley|vooley]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-s-th-v
|-
! Lemma
| kathasthevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithasthevoko|thithasthevoko]] || [[word:jithasthevoko|jithasthevoko]] || [[word:shithasthevoko|shithasthevoko]] || [[word:kithasthevoko|kithasthevoko]]
